005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve;
007
008import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings.Driver.Drive;
009import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings.Driver.Turn;
010import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings.Swerve;
011import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
012import com.stuypulse.stuylib.math.SLMath;
013import com.stuypulse.stuylib.math.Vector2D;
014import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.numbers.IStream;
015import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.numbers.filters.LowPassFilter;
016import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.vectors.VStream;
017import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.vectors.filters.VDeadZone;
018import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.vectors.filters.VLowPassFilter;
019import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.vectors.filters.VRateLimit;
020import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
021import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.CommandXboxController;
022
023public class SwerveDriveDrive extends Command {
024
025        private final CommandSwerveDrivetrain swerve;
026
027        private final CommandXboxController driver;
028
029        private final VStream speed;
030
031        private final IStream turn;
032
033        public SwerveDriveDrive(CommandXboxController driver) {
034                swerve = CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance();
035                speed = VStream.create(this::getDriverInputAsVelocity)
036                                .filtered(
037                                                new VDeadZone(Drive.DEADBAND),
038                                                x -> x.clamp(1),
039                                                x -> x.pow(Drive.POWER),
040                                                x -> x.mul(Swerve.Constraints.MAX_VELOCITY_M_PER_S),
041                                                new VRateLimit(Swerve.Constraints.MAX_ACCEL_M_PER_S_SQUARED),
042                                                new VLowPassFilter(Drive.RC));
043                turn = IStream.create(driver::getRightX)
044                                .filtered(
045                                                x -> SLMath.deadband(x, Turn.DEADBAND),
046                                                x -> SLMath.spow(x, Turn.POWER),
047                                                x -> x * Swerve.Constraints.MAX_ANGULAR_VEL_RAD_PER_S,
048                                                new LowPassFilter(Turn.RC));
049                this.driver = driver;
050                addRequirements(swerve);
051        }
052
053        private Vector2D getDriverInputAsVelocity() {
054                return new Vector2D(-driver.getLeftY(), -driver.getLeftX());
055        }
056
057        @Override
058        public void execute() {
059                swerve.setControl(
060                                swerve
061                                                .getFieldCentricSwerveRequest()
062                                                .withVelocityX(speed.get().x)
063                                                .withVelocityY(speed.get().y)
064                                                .withRotationalRate(-turn.getAsDouble()));
065        }
066}
